modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Warfare
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Warfare provides Warfare components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the objects and interactions necessary for Warfare communication in the JLVC Federation.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of JLVC Modular FOM.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 1.
JLVC2024 - Version 2: Added EventUUID to BattleDamageAssessment.
JLVC2024 - Version 3: Added enumerations to AttritionDamageEnum16 for Cyber and EMS_Jamming.

JLVC2024 - Version 4: Updated NewStructuralStatus and PreviousStructualStatus parameters to use the PercentUnsignedInteger8 dataType. Removed numberOfRecords parameter from Attrition interaction. Added EventUUID to GroupBDA, FacilityBDA, and AttritionStruct. Added enumeration to AttritionDamageEnum16 for environment.
JLVC2025 - Version 5: Updated AttritionStruct.killType attribute to use DISDamageStatusEnum32 datatype.
JLVC2025 - Version 6: Added TowedBy attribute to CounterMeasures.
JLVC2026 - Version 7: Removed old RPRnotes. Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Minefield FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Warfare FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Synthetic Environment FOM Module

objectClass.name: CounterMeasures
objectClass.semantics: Simpler counter measure implementation, originated by AWSIM

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the counter measure.

attribute.name: LVCIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the data contained in this object instance is related to a Live, Virtual, or Constructive entity.

objectClass.name: Chaff
objectClass.semantics: Two types of chaff clouds exist, packette and corridor. Packet modeling is defined by a center point from base entity spatial, and a radius. Corridor modeling is a straight cylinder, defined by two points, base entity spatial and EndPoint and a radius.

attribute.name: ChaffType
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. Type of Chaff \"drop\" (corridor or packet)

attribute.name: EndPoint
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. Second point defining chaff cylinder.

attribute.name: RFSpectralCoverage_High
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. High end of effective band.

attribute.name: RFSpectralCoverage_Low
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. Low end of effective band

attribute.name: RadarCrossSection
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. Radar reflectivity of sphere with specified radius

attribute.name: Radius
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. Radius of packette cloud, or around corridor line.

attribute.name: IRSpectralCoverage_Low
attribute.semantics: Low end of effective IR band

attribute.name: SweepLocation
attribute.semantics: Five points to describe a sweep area polygon which has been swept for mines. Last point must match the first.

attribute.name: Name
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute naming the clear lane.

interactionClass.name: Attrition
interactionClass.semantics: Entity attrition specified by a source other than that which owns the entity, i.e. MESL events to kill sim entities

parameter.name: attritionStruct
parameter.semantics: the collection of damaged entity id\'s, kill types, and damage reasons

parameter.name: from
parameter.semantics: Who sent this interaction

parameter.name: sequenceNumber
parameter.semantics: Combined with the \"from\" gives a unique identification of this interactio

interactionClass.name: BattleDamageAssessment
interactionClass.semantics: Provides information on the damage resulting from an attack.

parameter.name: DamageResultReason
parameter.semantics: The reason for the damage or lack thereof

parameter.name: ComputedDamageResult
parameter.semantics: The damage resulting from the attack.

parameter.name: MissionID
parameter.semantics: Optional. Associated mission identifier.

parameter.name: DamageDetails
parameter.semantics: The details of the damage, how long it will take to repair and the level of maintenance organization which will perform the repair.

parameter.name: DamageMethod
parameter.semantics: Optional. Informs how the damage was generated.

parameter.name: NewDamageState
parameter.semantics: Provides the new damage state.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: An identifier, taken from another interaction(s) and used to associate this interaction with linked events (i.e. WeaponFire/MunitionDetonation, AggregateCombat interactions, etc.).

parameter.name: PreviousDamageState
parameter.semantics: The damage state of the object prior to the event.

parameter.name: ReportingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The RTI Object Identifier of the reporting object.

parameter.name: ReportingID
parameter.semantics: Optional. The LVC ID of the reporting object for cases where it hasn’t been published into the federation. This includes cases where the entity is mounted inside a platform or in a hide box

parameter.name: EventUUID
parameter.semantics: Optional, unless reporting on a FIS event or object.

interactionClass.name: BattleDamageRepair
interactionClass.semantics: Performs handshaking for repair requests and replies

parameter.name: damagedEntity
parameter.semantics: RTI name of entity requesting repairs.

parameter.name: repairDetails
parameter.semantics: Array that reflects current state of damage/repair.

parameter.name: repairEntity
parameter.semantics: RTI name of entity that is/will help repair damaged system.

parameter.name: repairHandling
parameter.semantics: used to indicated MedEvac or similar special handling OPTIONAL.

parameter.name: repairNotes
parameter.semantics: Notes regarding damage, repair. One per Code. OPTIONAL.

parameter.name: statusCode
parameter.semantics: Enumeration value for repair status. If StatusCode has a value of DOWReport then field RepairTime in DamageRepairStruct in Parameter RepairDetails will be used to indicate the time until death (in minutes).

interactionClass.name: GroupBattleDamageAssessment
interactionClass.semantics: Provides information on the damage by a PopulationEntity object resulting from an attack. It is also used to provide system level damage taken by an aggregate resulting from an engagement on the Aggregate unit. Utilized for reporting Aggregate level BDA in one interaction via the J2B.

parameter.name: MissionID
parameter.semantics: Optional. Associated mission identifier.

parameter.name: DamageMethod
parameter.semantics: Optional. Informs how the damage was generated.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: An ID, generated by the issuing federate, used to associate the GroupBattleDamageAssessment interaction with related fire and detonation events.

parameter.name: ReportingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The RTI Object Identifier of the reporting object.

parameter.name: Attrition
parameter.semantics: Denotes the changes of damage state of the implicit members.

parameter.name: EventUUID
parameter.semantics: Optional, unless reporting on a FIS event or object.

interactionClass.name: JLVC_MunitionDetonation
interactionClass.semantics: MunitionDetonation interactions published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attribute.

parameter.name: MissionID
parameter.semantics: Optional. Associated mission identifier.

parameter.name: HitAimPoint
parameter.semantics: REQUIRED. Guided weapons use this field to indicate whether they hit their intended aimpoint or not

parameter.name: RelativeBulletLocation
parameter.semantics: This field contains the relative location of the point of closest approach of a bullet to the target's center of gravity.

parameter.name: WeaponFailCode
parameter.semantics: Indicates why a weapon failed.

parameter.name: IntendedTarget
parameter.semantics: DMPI_ID; Cardinality 0-1

parameter.name: TargetIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Equivalent to the Target Identifier in the USMTF TNO specification. This field can represent data from a variety of planning systems including BE Number (e.g. /1234DF8765), BE WITH SUFFIX (e.g. /S1234F1234599), BE WITH BEN SUFFIX (e.g. /N1234-12345AA001), PLSS (e.g. X12345), PIN (e.g. /E12345001), ABCA (e.g. /AAA1234), Theater Target Number (e.g. /T1A12345AZ), HULTEC (e.g. /H1234ABCEF123), and FIBE (e.g. / 2134AA1689)

parameter.name: DamageResultReason
parameter.semantics: Reason for NO damage to the facility

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Event identifier of the munition detonation.

parameter.name: NewStructuralStatus
parameter.semantics: Post Event structural Status %. 100% is undamaged and 0% is totally destroyed.

parameter.name: PreviousStructuralStatus
parameter.semantics: Pre-Event structural Status %. 100% is undamaged and 0% is totally destroyed.

parameter.name: MissionID
parameter.semantics: Optional. Associated mission identifier.

parameter.name: DamageMethod
parameter.semantics: Optional. Informs how the damage was generated.

parameter.name: EventUUID
parameter.semantics: Optional, unless reporting on a FIS event or object.

interactionClass.name: JLVC_WeaponFire
interactionClass.semantics: WeaponFire interactions published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attribute.

parameter.name: MissionID
parameter.semantics: Optional. Associated mission identifier.

interactionClass.name: MissionHistory
interactionClass.semantics: Report from end of Air Force mission

parameter.name: AC_Type
parameter.semantics: The type of aircraft

parameter.name: ATO_ID
parameter.semantics: the ATO identifier

parameter.name: Call_Sign
parameter.semantics: the aircraft call sign

parameter.name: Departure_Base
parameter.semantics: The base, if applicable, from which the aircraft departed on the mission

parameter.name: Departure_Platform
parameter.semantics: The platform, if applicable, from which the aircraft departed on the mission.

parameter.name: Departure_Time
parameter.semantics: The game time at which the flight departed.

parameter.name: Landing_Base
parameter.semantics: The base, if applicable, at which the aircraft landed.

parameter.name: Landing_Platform
parameter.semantics: The platform, if applicable, on which the aircraft landed.

parameter.name: Landing_Time
parameter.semantics: The game time at which the mission landed.

parameter.name: Mission_Number
parameter.semantics: flight\'s mission number

parameter.name: Mission_Type
parameter.semantics: flight\'s mission type

parameter.name: Side
parameter.semantics: flight\'s force

parameter.name: Squadron
parameter.semantics: squadron name

simpleData.name: dBsmUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: decibel measure of the radar cross section (RCS) of a target relative to one square meter.

simpleData.name: FeetFloat32
simpleData.semantics: feet expressed as a 32 bit float

simpleData.name: KilowattsPerSteradianFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Kilowatt/steradian expressed as a float value

enumeratedData.name: AttritionDamageEnum16
enumeratedData.semantics: The cause of the attrition or damage.

enumeratedData.name: DamageReasonEnum32
enumeratedData.semantics: A randomly drawn reason for the damage or lack of damage.

enumeratedData.name: HitAimPointEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: indicates whether aim point is hit

enumeratedData.name: RepairLevelEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: The maintenance organizational level required for the repair.

field.name: EventUUID
field.semantics: For report on FIS event or object.

fixedRecordData.name: DamageMemberStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specific personnel that were killed or wounded

field.name: damageReason
field.semantics: The reason for the damage or lack thereof

field.name: member
field.semantics: A class of entities that all with the same damage result code

fixedRecordData.name: DamageRepairStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The details of the damage, how long it will take to repair and the level of maintenance organization which will perform the repair.

field.name: damageCode
field.semantics: describes the condition that has been assigned to the person or piece of equipment - i.e. broken leg or overheated radiator, etc. The combat models and JDLM agree on the values during the database build process.

field.name: repairLevel
field.semantics: The maintenance organizational level required for the repair.

field.name: repairTime
field.semantics: The time in minutes required for repair.

fixedRecordData.name: ImplicitMemberStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specific personnel that were killed or wounded

field.name: Type
field.semantics: DIS Type of a given platform or lifeform

field.name: Authorized
field.semantics: Total expected number of entities of this type

field.name: Alive
field.semantics: Number of ALIVE and non wounded entities

field.name: MFkill
field.semantics: Number of Mobility/Fire powered killed entities

field.name: Kkill
field.semantics: Number that are killed or dead

fixedRecordData.name: GameTimeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The game time in days, hours, minutes, and seconds
